Fixed dose combination of Nitrofurantoin and Trimethoprim. 2 Fixed dose combination of Phenobarbitone with any anti-asthamatic drugs. 3. Fixed dose combination of Phenobarbitone with Hyoscin and/or Hyoscyamine. 4. Fixed dose combination of Phenobarbitone with Ergotamine and/or Belladona. 5. Fixed dose combination of Haloperidol with any anti-cholinergic agent including Propentheline Bromide. 6. Fixed dose combination of Nalidixic acid with any anti-amoebics including Metronidazole. 7. Fixed dose combination of Loperamide Hydrochloride with Furazolidone. 8. Fixed dose combina tion of Cyproheptadine with Lysine, or Peptone. [F. No. X-11014/1O/20O0-DMS &PFAJ DEEPAK GUPTA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note:—Principal Notification was published vide G. S.R. 578 (E) dated 23-7-1983 and last amended vide G. S.R.
